encounter.reason: Initiation of leflunomide as second-line conventional DMARD therapy
encounter.location: South Texas Rheumatology, San Antonio, TX

conditions.name: seropositive rheumatoid arthritis
conditions.note: Persistent moderate synovitis in hands and wrists bilaterally; initiating second-line DMARD.

conditions.name: history of methotrexate-induced hepatotoxicity
conditions.note: Referenced as clinical rationale for skipping leflunomide loading dose. LFTs confirmed normalized at this visit.

medications.name: leflunomide 20 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 20 mg tablet by mouth once daily. No loading dose.
medications.note: Loading dose intentionally omitted due to recent methotrexate-induced hepatotoxicity and to reduce GI side effect risk.

medications.name: folic acid 1 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 1 mg tablet by mouth once daily

medications.name: naproxen 500 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 500 mg tablet by mouth as needed for joint pain

medications.name: cetirizine 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take one 10 mg tablet by mouth once daily

document_references.description: Visit note documenting leflunomide 20 mg daily initiation as second-line conventional DMARD for seropositive rheumatoid arthritis, with pre-treatment baseline labs (CBC and CMP normal, LFTs normalized), clinical rationale for omitting the loading dose given prior methotrexate hepatotoxicity, patient counseling on side effects and monitoring plan, and step therapy documentation noting this is the second conventional DMARD trial with biologic escalation as next step if inadequate.
